description: This file defines the Bootstrap dropdown component, including its class, constants, event handling, and integration with Popper.js for positioning. It manages dropdown toggle, show/hide behavior, and accessibility features.

classes.name: Dropdown
classes.description: Represents the Bootstrap dropdown component, handling toggle, show, hide, and positioning logic, including event handling and integration with Popper.js.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the visibility of the dropdown menu.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the dropdown menu, creating a Popper instance for positioning.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the dropdown menu and destroys the Popper instance.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up the dropdown instance, destroying Popper if necessary.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates the dropdown's position and state, especially if in a navbar.

methods.name: _completeHide
methods.description: Handles the process of hiding the dropdown, including event triggering and cleanup.

methods.name: _getConfig
methods.description: Retrieves and validates the configuration options for the dropdown.

methods.name: _createPopper
methods.description: Creates a Popper.js instance for positioning the dropdown menu.

methods.name: _isShown
methods.description: Checks if the dropdown menu is currently visible.

methods.name: _getPlacement
methods.description: Determines the placement of the dropdown menu based on classes and RTL settings.

methods.name: _detectNavbar
methods.description: Detects if the dropdown is within a navbar element.

methods.name: _getOffset
methods.description: Calculates the offset for Popper positioning based on configuration.

methods.name: _getPopperConfig
methods.description: Builds the configuration object for Popper.js, including placement and modifiers.

methods.name: _selectMenuItem
methods.description: Handles keyboard navigation within the dropdown menu.

methods.name: clearMenus
methods.description: Static method to close all open dropdowns, handling various event types.

methods.name: dataApiKeydownHandler
methods.description: Handles keyboard events for dropdown toggles and menus for accessibility.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery-style invocation of dropdown methods.
